name: Luxury Gourmet Explorer Vietnam 13 days
highlights: Set sail through the emerald waters of this UNESCO World Heritage Site aboard an overnight cruise.
Delve into the imperial heritage of Hue as you savor royal-inspired dishes fit for kings and queens.
Join a hands-on cooking class led by a local chef.
Explore an intricate network of underground passages used by the Viet Cong during the Vietnam War.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Welcome dinner at Fine Dining restaurant
itinerary.description:
Morning

Upon arrival, our friendly tour guide will warmly welcome you and accompany you to your conveniently located hotel in the city center. Take some time to complete the check-in procedure and relax, ensuring a comfortable start to your trip. In the evening, indulge in a welcome dinner at one of Hanoi’s premier fine dining restaurants, where traditional Vietnamese flavors are artfully presented in a contemporary setting. This elegant culinary experience sets the tone for the cultural journey ahead.

itinerary.title: Hanoi Cooking Class - Egg Coffee at Giang Cafe
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a morning pickup from your hotel in the Hanoi Old Quarter, then head out with your local guide to explore a bustling traditional market. Learn how to bargain like a local and discover the key herbs and spices that define Vietnamese cuisine. After a guided demonstration, step into the kitchen and prepare a selection of authentic dishes with hands-on instruction from an experienced chef. Enjoy your creations in a warm, shared meal that highlights the flavors of the region. Afternoon

To wrap up the afternoon, visit the historic Café Giang for a relaxing break and enj...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Overnight on Luxury Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

08:00 - 08:30 Begin a remarkable journey as your tour guide picks you up from your hotel and escorts you to Halong Bay by car or shuttle bus. Board a stunning boat and prepare for an enchanting overnight cruise on the captivating Halong Bay, a UNESCO World Heritage site. Delight in delectable meals served onboard, including mouthwatering lunch and dinner options. Afternoon

Immerse yourself in a world of excitement with a range of engaging activities and unforgettable excursions during your cruise. Unleash your inner adventurer with kayaking, exploring hidden caves, or even squid fish...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi: Enjoy food tour at night
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin your day with a rejuvenating Tai Chi lesson or witness the enchanting sunrise over the mountains. Then, return to Hanoi, the vibrant capital city. Afternoon/ Night

At 17:30, move on a delightful walking food tour. Immerse yourself in the rich Vietnamese culture of Hanoi's Old Quarter. Explore the hidden culinary gems and savor local specialties like Bun Bo, Banh Cuon, Banh Mi, and indulge in the unique Ca Phe Trung (Egg Coffee) for a delightful conclusion to your gastronomic adventure.

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Flight to Hue, Enjoy Royal Dinner
itinerary.description:
Morning

Step into the historic city of Hue as our friendly tour guide welcomes you at the airport and escorts you to your hotel for a relaxing stay. Afternoon/ Night

Get a delightful cyclo tour, indulging your taste buds with an array of mouthwatering Hue cuisines while immersing yourself in the enchanting evening atmosphere of this cultural gem. Experience the ultimate dining experience fit for royalty as you savor "royal dishes" reminiscent of the extravagant feasts enjoyed exclusively by the Kings of the past.

itinerary.title: Hue City Tour full day
itinerary.description:
Morning

Wake up then join in a captivating journey starting from Toa Kham Wharf on a dragon boat to visit the iconic Thien Mu Pagoda, the oldest and most stunning pagoda in Hue. Continue your scenic cruise to Hue Ecolodge in Thuy Bieu Eco-village, where you'll have ample time to explore the serene village by leisurely strolling or biking. Immerse yourself in the local culture by visiting the garden, and ancestral temple, and interacting with friendly villagers. Then, witness the artistry of local artisans as you visit handicraft families and observe their traditional craftsmanship. Indulge in...

itinerary.title: Hue - Da Nang - Hoi An Road Transfer - Night Street Food
itinerary.description:
Morning/ Afternoon

Get ready for your transfer from Hue to Hoi An. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and enjoy some free time to unwind and relax. Night

When the sun sets, the vibrant streets of Hoi An come alive with an array of tantalizing street food options. Indulge in a culinary adventure as you stroll through the night market, where local vendors showcase their mouthwatering dishes. From delectable Banh Mi sandwiches and savory Cao Lau noodles to crispy Banh Xeo pancakes and refreshing sugarcane juice, there's something to satisfy every palate

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Cooking Class at Red Bridge
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your culinary morning at Hai Scout Café in the heart of Hoi An Ancient Town with a welcome drink and introduction to the day’s activities. Explore the vibrant central market, where you will discover a colorful array of fresh produce, herbs, and spices, and interact with local vendors to get a true sense of daily life in Hoi An. Next, enjoy a scenic 25-minute cruise along the Hoi An River to the Red Bridge Cooking School, offering a glimpse into the peaceful rhythms of riverside life. Upon arrival, stroll through the school’s herb and vegetable garden before joining a hands-on co...

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Explore The Roads Less Traveled
itinerary.description:
Morning

You can make your day with a captivating journey to Cam Kim Island, where you'll witness the picturesque countryside and immerse yourself in the local way of life. Visit the Ancestral House and traditional boat builders' yard, gaining insights into the island's rich heritage. Experience the serene beauty of rice paddies, interact with friendly locals, and savor delicious snacks and local coffee. Head to the stunning coast of the Thu Bon River mouth, passing by scenic roads adorned with cashew nut trees. Arrive at the charming Cam Thanh village, surrounded by water coconut palms, and r...

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Da Nang - Fly to Ho Chi Minh - City Tour & Luxury Dinner Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

Arrive in Ho Chi Minh City and check in at your hotel, ready to start an exciting urban adventure. Afternoon

Immerse yourself in the vibrant history and culture of Ho Chi Minh City with visits to iconic landmarks. Start your journey with an exploration of the War Remnants Museum to gain profound insights into Vietnam's wartime history through an extensive collection of artifacts and exhibits. Then, step back in Reunification Palace: as you explore the grandeur and significance of this historic site that marked a pivotal moment in Vietnam's independence. Moving on to marvel at the arc...

itinerary.title: Full Day Cu Chi Tunnel & Cooking Class
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 07:30, depart from your hotel for a scenic drive to Cu Chi District, known for its historical significance and peaceful countryside. Begin your day at the Ho Chi Minh Agricultural Villages, where you can stroll through lush rice fields and observe local prawn and fish farms, gaining firsthand insight into Vietnam’s rural lifestyle and sustainable farming practices. Next, participate in a hands-on cooking class led by experienced chefs. Learn how to prepare three traditional Vietnamese dishes and a local dessert using fresh ingredients from the farm. This immersive culinary experien...
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Discover Mekong Delta - Ben Tre
itinerary.description:
Option 1: Cai Be - Vinh Long (to Can Tho)

Begin at 10:00 with a welcome drink at Cai Be Jetty before boarding the Cai Be Princess Sampan. Enjoy a scenic cruise through the Mekong Delta, visit a 19th-century traditional house, and explore local workshops making coconut candy and puffed rice. Lunch is served in colonial elegance at Le Longanier Restaurant. In the afternoon, cruise through lush canals past An Binh and Binh Hoa Phuoc Islands, stopping at Cai Be Church before docking at Vinh Long. A vehicle awaits to transfer you to Can Tho
itinerary.accommodation: Hotel in Ho Chi Minh City

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City - Departure
itinerary.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at the hotel, savoring a variety of delectable options. Then, enjoy some leisure time to relax and make the most of your stay before your departure. Our team will pick you up from the hotel and provide a convenient transfer to the airport for your onward flight. Bid farewell to your destination with cherished memories of your journey.

included: Overnight in shared Twin/ Double room with air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport in tour - transfer by new modern vehicle
Domestic flight tickets in tour: Hanoi - Hue; Da Nang - Ho Chi Minh (20 kg luggage inclusion)
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE

If you have any specific food requirements (vegetarian, vegan, food allergies) please inform us in advance so that we can provide notice to restaurants, tour guide or our partners so that they can serve you better.
